name: Gari Eberly
bio: Gari received degrees in Biomedical Engineering and English from Bucknell University in 2021 and joined the Harvard-MIT Department of Health Sciences and Technology later that year. Previously, she worked on biomimetic materials and fabrication processes for microECoG devices. Currently, she is developing calcium imaging technologies for GI tract and optoelectronic interfaces for the uterus. She's loves baking, running, and can do 3 pull ups in a row.
